# terrible_community_general_homebrew_cask (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `accept_external_apps` (Boolean) Allow external apps.
- `greedy` (Boolean) Upgrade casks that auto update. Passes `--greedy` to `brew outdated --cask` when checking if an installed cask has a newer version available, or to `brew upgrade --cask` when upgrading all casks.
- `install_options` (String) Options flags to install a package.
- `name` (String) Name of cask to install or remove.
- `path` (String) ':' separated list of paths to search for 'brew' executable.
- `state` (String) State of the cask.
- `sudo_password` (String) The sudo password to be passed to `SUDO_ASKPASS`.
- `update_homebrew` (Boolean) Update homebrew itself first. Note that `brew cask update` is a synonym for `brew update`.
- `upgrade_all` (Boolean) Upgrade all casks. Mutually exclusive with `upgraded` state.
